title: acetosa intermedia
intro: Acetosa intermedia, also known as sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acetosa intermedia include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and gastritis, as well as providing relief from joint pain and fever. The plant can be consumed as a tea, added to soups or salads, or used in tincture form to reap its medicinal benefits.
